project.name: flutter-resources
project.description: Monorepo of Flutter/Dart utility packages (core, masks, search, streams, reactor/FP, value notifiers) shared across apps.

nodes.name: build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions continuous integration workflow that runs on every push, installs stable Flutter, executes the repository analysis and test runner, and uploads coverage results to Codecov.

nodes.name: Slim FP core migration plan
nodes.summary: Decision record and implementation plan for replacing fpdart with local Either, TaskEither, Task, Unit, and identity primitives in reactor_fp_resources. It explicitly removes Option and compatibility shims, keeps Reactor in its package, identifies downstream flutter_resources2 and sigebase migration slices, and requires the eventual commit to call out breaking changes and credit adapted fpdart code.

nodes.name: Slim FP migration progress
nodes.summary: Execution checklist for the fpdart removal. It records completion of the local FP implementation, Option API removal, downstream call-site updates, restored iterable and function helpers, analyzer conflict fixes, package tests, and a full workspace analysis with zero errors; only owner-authorized commits remain pending.

nodes.name: Slim FP migration verification
nodes.summary: Verification checklist confirming that reactor_fp_resources no longer declares fpdart, its tests pass, flutter_resources2 uses the sibling path dependency with clean FP tests and analysis, and sigebase and ctmam analyze with path dependencies. The required breaking-change and fpdart acknowledgment in the commit message remains pending.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Defines the file and directory patterns excluded from Understand-Anything codebase scanning.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configures Understand-Anything output language and automatic graph-update behavior.

nodes.name: analysis_options.yaml
nodes.summary: Defines repository-wide Dart analyzer, formatter, and lint rules for the utility packages.

nodes.name: build.dart
nodes.summary: Provides the monorepo command runner that discovers package directories and executes a requested command in each package.

nodes.name: .metadata
nodes.summary: Stores Flutter project migration metadata for the core_resources package.

nodes.name: core_resources.iml
nodes.summary: Describes the core_resources IntelliJ module and its source-folder exclusions.

nodes.name: core_resources.dart
nodes.summary: Public package entry point that re-exports shared dependencies and all core_resources feature barrels.
nodes.languageNotes: Dart export directives define the package's public API surface.

nodes.name: base_router.dart
nodes.summary: Defines the abstract navigation contract used to push, replace, and select bottom-navigation routes through Core.

nodes.name: baseclasses.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel exporting the package's reusable base-class contracts.

nodes.name: classes.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel exporting the package's shared concrete classes.

nodes.name: core_router_observer.dart
nodes.summary: Tracks current and previous Flutter routes through a ValueNotifier-backed NavigatorObserver.

nodes.name: core.dart
nodes.summary: Central static façade for dependency lookup and injectable navigation, back, path, parameter, and extras callbacks.
nodes.languageNotes: Static callback injection decouples package consumers from a specific router implementation.

nodes.name: async_snapshot_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds connection-state predicates and exhaustive loading/error/data rendering helpers to Flutter AsyncSnapshot values.

nodes.name: color_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds hexadecimal conversion and brightness estimation helpers to Flutter Color values.

nodes.name: context_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Collects BuildContext extensions for snackbars, media queries, navigation, theming, scaffolds, forms, focus, and route metadata.

nodes.name: execution_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Provides guarded synchronous execution and elapsed-time measurement utilities with a typed benchmark result.

nodes.name: extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel exporting all core_resources extension libraries.

nodes.name: future_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Provides Future execution fallbacks, optional error logging, nullable/default recovery, and empty-list recovery helpers.

nodes.name: iterable_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds indexed replacement behavior that produces an updated iterable value.

nodes.name: number_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds numeric parsing, digit extraction, currency-style formatting, and decimal trimming helpers.

nodes.name: object_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds Material state-property wrapping and fluent apply-style transformation to arbitrary objects.

nodes.name: stream_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds filtering and first-match projection helpers to streams of lists.

nodes.name: string_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds fallback, truncation, suffix extraction, and URI parsing helpers to strings.

nodes.name: time_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds localized formatting, relative-time descriptions, standard serialization, and component-wise updates to DateTime.

nodes.name: common_intents.dart
nodes.summary: Builds common external intents for map locations, phone dialing, and WhatsApp messages.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses the requested command, runs it across discovered packages, and reports aggregate success or failure.

nodes.name: getPackages
nodes.summary: Discovers immediate child directories that contain a pubspec manifest.

nodes.name: runCommand
nodes.summary: Executes a command in one package directory while forwarding process output and status.

nodes.name: BaseRouter
nodes.summary: Abstract router contract that delegates navigation to Core and maps bottom-navigation indexes to route names.

nodes.name: CoreRouterObserver
nodes.summary: NavigatorObserver that publishes route transitions as CoreRoute values.

nodes.name: CoreRoute
nodes.summary: Immutable equatable value carrying the current and previous route references.

nodes.name: Core
nodes.summary: Static integration façade whose injected callbacks provide dependency lookup and router-independent navigation state.

nodes.name: CRAsyncSnapshotExtensions
nodes.summary: Dart extension exposing AsyncSnapshot state predicates and conditional rendering.

nodes.name: CRColorExtensions
nodes.summary: Dart extension for converting Flutter colors to and from hex and estimating brightness.

nodes.name: CRContextExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension for snackbar access and platform/theme brightness checks.

nodes.name: CRMediaQueryExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension exposing media-query values, orientation, and device-size classifications.

nodes.name: CRNavigatorExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension wrapping common Navigator operations.

nodes.name: CRThemeExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension exposing ThemeData, platform checks, colors, and text styles.

nodes.name: CRScaffoldExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension for opening drawers and presenting scaffold bottom sheets.

nodes.name: CRFormExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension providing a compact façade over the nearest Form state.

nodes.name: CRFocusScopeExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension for focus-scope access and keyboard dismissal.

nodes.name: CRModalRouteExtensions
nodes.summary: BuildContext extension exposing the active modal route and its settings.

nodes.name: runCatching
nodes.summary: Runs a synchronous callback and returns null when it throws.

nodes.name: runOrDefault
nodes.summary: Runs a synchronous callback and returns a supplied fallback when it throws.

nodes.name: measureTimeMillis
nodes.summary: Measures an operation with a Stopwatch and returns both its value and elapsed milliseconds.

nodes.name: BenchmarkedResult
nodes.summary: Generic result value pairing an operation output with its elapsed milliseconds.

nodes.name: runAsync
nodes.summary: Schedules a callback as a Future and converts failures to null.

nodes.name: runAsyncOrDefault
nodes.summary: Awaits a callback and returns a fallback value when execution fails.

nodes.name: CRFutureExtensions
nodes.summary: Future extension adding error logging and nullable or default recovery.

nodes.name: FutureListExtensions
nodes.summary: Future-list extension that recovers failed computations with an empty list.

nodes.name: CRIterableExtensions
nodes.summary: Iterable extension supporting immutable-style indexed replacement.

nodes.name: CRStringToNumberExtensions
nodes.summary: String extension for retaining digits and parsing them as an integer.

nodes.name: CRDoubleExtensions
nodes.summary: Double extension for localized-looking currency output and trimmed decimal formatting.

nodes.name: CRObjectExtensions
nodes.summary: Generic object extension for Material properties and fluent transformations.

nodes.name: CRListStreamExtensions
nodes.summary: Stream-of-lists extension for filtering each emission or selecting its first matching item.

nodes.name: CRStringExtensions
nodes.summary: String extension grouping fallback, truncation, suffix, and URI conversion operations.

nodes.name: CRTimeExtensions
nodes.summary: DateTime extension for formatting, relative descriptions, serialization, and field replacement.

nodes.name: CommonIntents
nodes.summary: Static utility namespace that constructs map, telephone, and WhatsApp intent URIs.

nodes.name: date_time.dart
nodes.summary: Parses colon-delimited time strings into Dart Duration values with validation for malformed input.

nodes.name: parseDuration
nodes.summary: Parses a colon-delimited hour, minute, and second string into a Duration.

nodes.name: fade_page_route.dart
nodes.summary: Defines a reusable Flutter page route that transitions new pages with a fade animation.

nodes.name: FadePageRoute
nodes.summary: PageRoute implementation that fades a supplied page into view.

nodes.name: form_validation.dart
nodes.summary: Provides composable form validators for required values, lengths, contact data, Brazilian documents, URLs, and numeric input.

nodes.name: validators
nodes.summary: Combines validators and returns the first validation error.

nodes.name: requiredValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator that rejects null or empty values.

nodes.name: minLengthValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator enforcing a minimum string length.

nodes.name: emailValidator
nodes.summary: Creates an email-format validator with optional blank-value support.

nodes.name: phoneValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a numeric phone validator for a required digit length.

nodes.name: cpfValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator for Brazilian CPF identifiers.

nodes.name: optionalCpfValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a CPF validator that permits blank input.

nodes.name: cnpjValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator for Brazilian CNPJ identifiers.

nodes.name: zipValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator for Brazilian postal codes.

nodes.name: userValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator for allowed username characters.

nodes.name: urlValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator for absolute HTTP and HTTPS URLs.

nodes.name: validIntValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator that requires integer-compatible input.

nodes.name: validDoubleValidator
nodes.summary: Creates a validator that requires double-compatible input.

nodes.name: functions.dart
nodes.summary: Provides small generic function invocation and identity-to-string helpers.

nodes.name: invoke
nodes.summary: Invokes and returns the result of a supplied zero-argument function.

nodes.name: identityString
nodes.summary: Converts an arbitrary value to its string representation.

nodes.name: hooks.dart
nodes.summary: Provides Flutter Hooks helpers for memoized futures and streams plus animation completion handling.

nodes.name: useMemoizedFuture
nodes.summary: Memoizes a future factory and subscribes to its AsyncSnapshot.

nodes.name: useFutureData
nodes.summary: Subscribes to a future and returns its latest data.

nodes.name: useMemoizedFutureData
nodes.summary: Memoizes a future factory and returns its latest data.

nodes.name: useMemoizedStream
nodes.summary: Memoizes a stream factory and subscribes to its AsyncSnapshot.

nodes.name: useStreamData
nodes.summary: Subscribes to a stream and returns its latest data.

nodes.name: useMemoizedStreamData
nodes.summary: Memoizes a stream factory and returns its latest data.

nodes.name: useStartAnimationControllerWithCompletionCallback
nodes.summary: Starts an animation controller and wires a completion callback for the hook lifecycle.

nodes.name: json.dart
nodes.summary: Provides typed JSON decoding and background-isolate serialization helpers for responsive Flutter applications.

nodes.name: jsonDecodeObj
nodes.summary: Decodes a JSON object off the UI isolate.

nodes.name: jsonDecodeArray
nodes.summary: Decodes a JSON array off the UI isolate.

nodes.name: jsonDecodeBytesBg
nodes.summary: Decodes UTF-8 JSON bytes in a background isolate.

nodes.name: jsonEncodeBg
nodes.summary: Encodes an object as JSON off the UI isolate.

nodes.name: log.dart
nodes.summary: Provides a central logging helper that routes normal messages and errors to the configured Dart logger.

nodes.name: clog
nodes.summary: Logs informational values or severe errors with optional stack and zone context.

nodes.name: math.dart
nodes.summary: Provides degree-to-radian and radian-to-degree conversion helpers.

nodes.name: degToRad
nodes.summary: Converts an angle from degrees to radians.

nodes.name: radToDeg
nodes.summary: Converts an angle from radians to degrees.

nodes.name: nav.dart
nodes.summary: Wraps common Flutter Navigator operations, including named, replacement, history-clearing, and fade-route navigation.

nodes.name: ui.dart
nodes.summary: Builds MaterialColor swatches by deriving shade variants from a source Color.

nodes.name: createMaterialColor

nodes.summary: Barrel library that exposes the core_resources utility API from one import.

nodes.name: conditional_render.dart
nodes.summary: Defines a configurable widget that conditionally renders children with optional animated switching.

nodes.name: ConditionalRender

nodes.name: dialogs.dart

nodes.name: number_stepper.dart

nodes.name: splash_widget.dart

nodes.summary: Accepts up to five ignored values and returns Unit.

nodes.name: taskEitherCatch
nodes.summary: Wraps an asynchronous throwing function in TaskEither using a simplified typed-error callback.

nodes.name: eitherCatch
nodes.summary: Wraps a synchronous throwing function in Either using a simplified typed-error callback.

nodes.name: right
nodes.summary: Constructs a successful Right value.

nodes.name: left
nodes.summary: Constructs a failed Left value.

nodes.name: Either
nodes.summary: Sealed typed success-or-failure abstraction with constructors, transformations, matching, and list traversal helpers.

nodes.name: Right
nodes.summary: Successful Either variant that stores and transforms a right value.

nodes.name: Left
nodes.summary: Failed Either variant that stores and propagates a left value.

nodes.name: identity
nodes.summary: Returns its input unchanged.

nodes.name: identityFuture
nodes.summary: Returns its input in a completed Future.

nodes.name: TaskEither
nodes.summary: Lazy asynchronous computation yielding Either, with typed construction, composition, recovery, execution, and parallel or sequential collection.

nodes.name: EitherToTaskEither
nodes.summary: Extension that lifts an Either into a completed TaskEither.

nodes.name: task.dart
nodes.summary: Defines Task, a lazy asynchronous computation that cannot represent failure and supports mapping, chaining, parallel traversal, and sequential traversal.

nodes.name: Task
nodes.summary: Wraps a deferred Future computation with map, flatMap, execution, traversal, and sequencing combinators.

nodes.name: unit.dart
nodes.summary: Provides the singleton Unit value used for successful computations that have no meaningful result.

nodes.name: Unit
nodes.summary: Represents the sole no-value success result exposed through the top-level unit constant.

nodes.name: reactor.dart
nodes.summary: Defines a callable ValueNotifier wrapper, concise constructors, a suffix extension, and a Flutter hook for reactive values.

nodes.name: Reactor
nodes.summary: Extends ValueNotifier with direct assignment, reducer updates, and callable value access.

nodes.name: Rc
nodes.summary: Creates a Reactor for a non-nullable initial value.

nodes.name: Rcn
nodes.summary: Creates a nullable Reactor with an optional initial value.

nodes.name: ReactorX
nodes.summary: Adds the rc getter to every value for concise Reactor creation.

nodes.name: useReactor
nodes.summary: Subscribes a Flutter hook to a ValueListenable and returns its current value.

nodes.name: stream_reactor.dart
nodes.summary: Adapts streams into Reactor values with eager or listener-driven subscription lifecycles.

nodes.name: StreamReactor
nodes.summary: Mirrors stream emissions into Reactor state while subscribing eagerly or only while listeners exist.

nodes.name: ReactorStreamX
nodes.summary: Converts any stream into a nullable StreamReactor through asRc.

nodes.name: ReactorStreamX2
nodes.summary: Converts non-nullable streams into StreamReactor values with a required initial value.

nodes.summary: Declares package metadata and Flutter dependencies for the reactor and functional-programming resources package.

nodes.summary: Comprehensively tests Either construction, Right and Left combinators, matching, collection traversal, and value equality.

nodes.summary: Comprehensively tests TaskEither constructors, short-circuit composition, recovery, matching, effects, and parallel or sequential collection operations.

nodes.summary: Tests top-level functional helpers for discarding values and converting thrown exceptions to Either or TaskEither failures.

nodes.summary: Tests Reactor reducers, nullable and suffix constructors, callable access, direct updates, and hook-driven widget rebuilds.

nodes.summary: Tests eager and lazy stream subscriptions, nullable and non-nullable initial values, listener updates, and unsubscription.

nodes.summary: Provides a Flutter hook that follows a ValueStream while falling back to its current synchronous value.

nodes.summary: Subscribes to a ValueStream and returns snapshot data or the stream's current value.

nodes.summary: Adds a generic Dart extension that wraps any object in a seeded RxDart BehaviorSubject.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a generic extension getter to preserve the receiver type in the resulting BehaviorSubject.

nodes.summary: Generic extension exposing the subject getter on every Dart object.

nodes.summary: Creates a BehaviorSubject seeded with the extension receiver.

nodes.name: .metadata
nodes.summary: Flutter tool metadata recording the SDK revision, stable channel, and package project type for upgrade tooling.

nodes.name: computed_value_listenable.dart
nodes.summary: Builds derived ValueListenables from multiple watched inputs and manages merged listener subscription and disposal lifecycle.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines generic ValueListenable APIs with lazy listener attachment so derived values can be read without an active subscription.

nodes.name: computedValueListenable
nodes.summary: Collects ValueListenables watched by a builder and returns a notifier whose value is recomputed from them.

nodes.name: _MultiValueNotifier
nodes.summary: Private ValueNotifier implementation that merges source listenables, recomputes values, and attaches or detaches upstream listeners as needed.

nodes.name: ComputedValueListenableRef
nodes.summary: Reference passed to computed builders that records watched listenables and returns their current values.

nodes.name: value
nodes.summary: Recomputes and returns the current derived value through the configured builder.

nodes.name: onUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles an upstream notification by rebuilding and assigning the derived value.

nodes.name: addListener
nodes.summary: Lazily subscribes to merged upstream listenables before registering a downstream listener.

nodes.name: removeListener
nodes.summary: Removes a downstream listener and unsubscribes from upstream inputs when none remain.

nodes.name: dispose
nodes.summary: Disposes the notifier and detaches its merged upstream listener.

nodes.name: watch
nodes.summary: Registers a ValueListenable as a dependency and returns its current value to the computed builder.

nodes.name: value_listenable_extensions.dart
nodes.summary: Adds mapping and filtering helpers to ValueListenable by delegating to functional_listener transformations.

nodes.name: CRValueListenableExtensions
nodes.summary: Generic extension that exposes event mapping and filtering operations on ValueListenable instances.

nodes.name: mapEvent
nodes.summary: Creates a connected ValueListenable whose values are converted by the supplied mapping function.

nodes.name: whereEvent
nodes.summary: Creates a filtered ValueListenable that only propagates values accepted by the selector.

nodes.name: value_notifier_resources.dart
nodes.summary: Public package barrel exposing functional_listener, rx_notifier, computed listenables, and ValueListenable extensions.
nodes.languageNotes: Re-exports both third-party packages and local implementation files as one Dart library surface.

nodes.name: pubspec.yaml
nodes.summary: Defines the unpublished value_notifier_resources Flutter package and its core_resources, functional_listener, rx_notifier, and test dependencies.

nodes.summary: Tests computed ValueListenable initial values, recomputation, emissions, listener removal, and disposal behavior across multiple inputs.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Registers the computed ValueListenable behavior and lifecycle test suite.

nodes.name: value_listenable_extensions_test.dart
nodes.summary: Tests mapped and filtered ValueListenables for current-value transformation and expected emission counts.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Registers tests for the mapEvent and whereEvent extensions.

nodes.name: value_notifier_resources.iml
nodes.summary: IDE module descriptor defining package source roots, test roots, SDK libraries, and generated-directory exclusions.

layers.name: Documentation & CI
layers.description: Repository-wide documentation, analysis configuration, monorepo automation, and continuous integration.

layers.name: Core resources (foundation)
layers.description: Shared Flutter foundation containing navigation, extensions, utilities, reusable widgets, package configuration, and tests.

layers.name: Text masking
layers.description: Predefined Brazilian input masks, package metadata, public API, and formatter tests.

layers.name: Search UI
layers.description: Reusable Flutter search app bar and delegate components with package metadata and widget tests.

layers.name: Streams/Rx
layers.description: RxDart stream helpers, Flutter hooks, package configuration, and reactive stream tests.

layers.name: Reactor & FP
layers.description: Local functional-programming primitives, TaskEither composition, Reactor state wrappers, stream integration, package metadata, and tests.

layers.name: Value notifiers
layers.description: Computed and transformed ValueListenable utilities, package configuration, and listener lifecycle tests.

tour.title: Monorepo Overview and Package Map
tour.description: Start with the repository README to understand the shared goal of the workspace, the six independently consumable Flutter packages, and the git-path installation model used by downstream apps.

tour.title: core_resources Public Surface
tour.description: Follow the main package barrel into its feature barrels. Notice that core_resources exposes selected third-party foundations alongside its own base classes, concrete classes, Core facade, extensions, utilities, and widgets.

tour.title: Core Facade and Navigation Abstractions
tour.description: Study how the static Core facade centralizes dependency lookup and injectable route callbacks, then compare the BaseRouter contract, route observer, and Navigator helpers that adapt those abstractions to Flutter navigation.

tour.title: Core Extensions, Utilities, and Widgets
tour.description: Sample the three main kinds of reusable building blocks: BuildContext and asynchronous extensions, validation and JSON utilities, and state-aware widgets. These examples show the package's preference for compact APIs around recurring app-development tasks.

tour.title: Focused UI Packages: Masks and Search
tour.description: Move to the smallest feature packages. masked_text_resources publishes predefined Brazilian input masks, while search_resources packages an inline search app bar and a reusable SearchDelegate base behind narrow public barrels.

tour.title: Reactive Helpers: Streams and ValueListenables
tour.description: Compare the two reactive utility packages. stream_resources layers hooks and object-to-BehaviorSubject conversion over RxDart, while value_notifier_resources provides computed listenables plus mapping and filtering transformations.

tour.title: reactor_fp_resources Functional Core
tour.description: Enter through the reactor package barrel and its local FP barrel, then learn the progression from Either for typed synchronous failures to lazy Task and asynchronous TaskEither computations, with Unit representing success without a meaningful value.

tour.title: FP Composition and Reactor Integration
tour.description: See how application-facing extensions, top-level constructors, and do-notation make the FP primitives ergonomic. Finish the package by tracing Reactor's ValueNotifier wrapper and the stream adapter that controls eager or listener-driven subscriptions.

tour.title: Workspace Build and Continuous Integration
tour.description: Close with the repository-wide quality loop. build.dart discovers every package, restores dependencies, analyzes code, runs tests with coverage, and aggregates failures; the GitHub Actions workflow invokes that runner on pushes and uploads coverage to Codecov.
